posts.text: Refund for cancelled order by user — Since the orders have been cancelled, the debited amount will be refunded by ICCL on T+4 days.

posts.text: Refund for cancelled order by user — I have started new SIP, amount deducted from account but order cancelled by user. so when will I get the refund for cancelled order ?
